name: Orange Waldorf Salad Ada
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the oranges and apple into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine the chopped oranges, apple, toasted pecans, celery, ground cinnamon, and plain low-fat yogurt.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.
4. Serve the salad on top of salad greens.
1 serving = 1/2 vegetable exchange + 1 1/2 fruit + 1 fat exchange = 145 calories, 23 carbs, 3 protein, 6 fat, 18 sodium, 376 potassium, 1 cholesterol from the ADA Holiday cookbook by Dr. Betty Wedman.
